---
pagetitle: "Austin Lin — Portfolio"
description: "Systems & Mechanical Engineer — robotics, controls, embedded systems, and rapid prototyping."
toc: false
listing:
  id: project-listing
  contents: pages/projects
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  categories: false
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  image-align: left
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <h1>Austin Lin</h1>
  <div class="tagline">Systems &amp; Mechanical Engineer</div>
  <p class="bio">
    I build robots, controls, and embedded systems, from autonomous
    LiDAR navigation and collaborative manipulators to interactive simulations.
    I currently work as an electrical systems engineer, with a background in mechanical engineering and robotics from the University of Maryland.
  </p>
</div>
```

## Projects

::: {#project-listing}
:::
